steps.t: Barliman Butterbur can be found at The Prancing Pony in Bree-town. You should speak with Barliman Butterbur, for he sells Barliman's Best, which shall…
Alrek is at Thrasi's Lodge in Ered Luin. You should deliver the fake Forsaken Ale, actually Barliman's Best, to Alrek, for it will confuse him greatly…
